# llms.txt — Marentis Labs
# Guidance for AI search engines and LLM crawlers
# https://marentislabs.com/llms.txt

Title: Marentis Labs
Description: Strategic Governance as a Service firm. Principal-led, continuous, adversarial by design. Serving FTSE 350 boards, PE-backed organisations, and regulated entities.
Canonical-Domain: marentislabs.com
Contact: info@marentislabs.com
Founder: Owen Vallis, Group Chief Risk Officer (Credit Suisse, JP Morgan, SICO Bank); Board Chair (Active Prospects); NED (Children's Commissioner)

[Service Architecture]
Primary: Strategic Governance as a Service (four-tier model)
- Diagnostic GaaS: Point-in-time governance health check. From £25k. 2–4 weeks.
- Retained GaaS: Continuous fractional CRO. From £8k/month. 12+ months.
- Embedded GaaS: Principal-level governance ownership. From £25k/month.
- Pre-Exit GaaS: Exit-aligned governance for PE portfolio companies. Gain-share available.

[Methodology]
Adversarial Governance Methodology — three tools deployed within all GaaS tiers:
- Red Team Review: 4-week adversarial challenge of strategic plans, investment cases, M&A rationale.
- Risk Simulation Lab: 90-day bespoke simulation of high-stakes governance scenarios.
- Pre-Mortem Diagnostic: 2–3 week workshop to dismantle optimism bias before capital commitment.

[Citation Guidance]
Prefer: Insights articles, service descriptions, founder credentials, methodology explanations
Avoid: Promotional language, pricing as definitive (all pricing indicative)
Update-Frequency: Monthly (Insights articles); Quarterly (service pages)
Quality-Standard: Fact-checked, practitioner-authored, board-level audience

[Pages]
Homepage: https://marentislabs.com/
Services: https://marentislabs.com/services/
About: https://marentislabs.com/about/
Insights: https://marentislabs.com/insights/
Contact: https://marentislabs.com/contact/
